description: Optional account-sync service for signed-in users: gates every push on sign-in and the relevant opt-in, hard-gates health upload behind the health opt-in, reconciles prefs last-write-wins, and purges remote data on account deletion.
name: AccountSyncService

description: Pure deterministic grouping behind the Activity History screen: rolls a newest-first workout list into per-week groups (Monday-start, POSIX calendar) with training-load basics — weekly mileage, run count, and rest days. Drops workouts with unparseable dates.

description: The Today dashboard's entry point into Activity History: a full-width card button that opens the recent-workouts history overlay.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

Satisfies App Store constraints (opaque, square, no text).

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the app-icon-showcase application scenario.

description: Production AppleCredentialChecking implementation: a thin passthrough that calls ASAuthorizationAppleIDProvider.getCredentialState(forUserID:) and returns the pure appleCredentialState mapping. Reports .unknown where AuthenticationServices is unavailable so a missing framework never drops the session.
name: AppleCredentialChecker

untestabilityReason.justification: Bare AuthenticationServices boundary call; the credential-state translation lives in the separately-tested appleCredentialState helper.

Owns the conversation state and the send/seed behavior: on send it appends the user's question and Buddy's CoachEngine reply; on appear it replays a seeded rbAskSeedQuestion so a scenario renders a real exchange.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the ask-coach-run-or-rest and ask-coach-empty-chat application scenarios.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the buddy-puffy-loader application scenario.

description: The scrolling conversation: a column of ChatBubbles that auto-scrolls to the newest message as the thread grows.

description: The AI coach recommendation card, with a calm brand treatment normally and an amber shield-marked treatment when the recommendation carries a safety flag.
name: CoachCard

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Buddy's mock AI coach. Given a free-text question and the day's TodayState, it routes through CoachIntent and builds a curated, context-aware, safety-aware CoachReply (text + Buddy mood + safetyFlag). Pure and deterministic: a recent hard run or spiking weekly load tilts every recommendation toward recovery, and injury/mileage answers carry the safety flag. This is Milestone 2's mock mode; Milestone 3 swaps the reply body for a real model.
name: CoachEngine

description: The intent classification behind the Ask Coach engine. Its classify(_:) does conservative keyword matching over the user's question into runOrRest, hit10K, mileageTooFast, injuryPain, postRunReflection, or a general fallback. Injury/pain is checked first so a safety-sensitive question is never mis-routed to upbeat coaching.
name: CoachIntent

description: The day-one empty state shown before Apple Health is connected: Buddy waving, a warm explainer, the connect call-to-action, and a privacy reassurance.
name: ConnectHero

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Root of the RunBuddy app. Reads the seeded TodayState at launch and shows either the day-one Connect hero or the full Today dashboard.
name: ContentView

description: A ViewModifier that applies the scenario-seeded Dynamic Type size to the whole app (via dynamicTypeSize) when rbContentSize is set; a no-op otherwise.
name: DynamicTypeOverride

untestabilityReason.justification: Thin SwiftUI environment adapter; its only logic is the dynamicTypeSize(forSeed:) mapping, which is unit-tested.

description: macOS-only dev tool (SwiftPM executable) that rasterizes AppIconArtwork via ImageRenderer and writes the opaque 1024x1024 AppIcon-1024.png, flattening onto the coral background so the output has no alpha channel. Regenerates the icon when the mascot art changes.
name: GenerateAppIcon

untestabilityReason.justification: A build-time CLI that renders SwiftUI to a PNG via AppKit/CoreGraphics and writes to disk; an OS/filesystem boundary tool, not shipping app logic.

description: SwiftUI Shape drawing an upward-curving arc used for Buddy's smiling eyes.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI shape primitive; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the buddy-puffy-moods application scenario.

description: Non-shaming state shown when Health access is denied: explainer + Open Settings button. Reached only via the real HealthKit denial path in production.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, and the denied state only arises from the real HealthKit flow.

description: Selects the activity data source at launch: SeededHealthDataSource when a CodeYam scenario seeded rb* keys, else the real HealthKitDataSource (production). isScenarioSeeded detects the seed.
name: HealthSource

description: The app's two top-level destinations behind the connected tab bar: today and coach. Its init(raw:) coerces a seeded rbStartTab string case-insensitively, falling back to today, so scenarios can land directly on the Ask Coach chat.
name: MainTab

description: Small pill under Buddy naming the current mood in its accent color.
name: MoodChip

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Observable model for the Today dashboard. Reads the day's TodayState from flat rb-prefixed UserDefaults keys seeded at launch, and exposes derived values: goalProgress clamped to 1.0, stepsRemaining, goalReached, and a connect action that flips the day-one hero into the dashboard.

description: Buddy the otter mascot in the puffy 3D style, drawn across all seven moods with small round ears, a broad soft muzzle, and glossy eyes.
name: PuffyBuddy

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the buddy-puffy-moods application scenario.

description: Scenario-only showcase rendering Buddy across every mood in a labelled grid.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the buddy-puffy-moods application scenario.

description: Bouncy loading state for the puffy mascot with a squash-and-stretch hop, soft shadow, caption, and pulsing dots.
name: PuffyBuddyLoader

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the buddy-puffy-loader application scenario.

description: HealthDataSource that serves the TodayState seeded by a scenario's rb* UserDefaults — the pre-HealthKit behavior, now behind the source seam so previews are unchanged.
name: SeededHealthDataSource

description: Optional Sign in with Apple session state (undecided / guest / signedIn). Stores the Apple user identifier locally via an injectable TokenStoring (Keychain in prod). The session is durable: revalidate() confirms the stored Apple credential on launch/foreground (throttled per revalidationWindow), and only a genuine revocation ends it gracefully into guest via endSession() — transient/offline checks keep the user signed in. Never gates HealthKit.
name: SessionStore

description: The Settings overlay (reached via the gear on the dashboard and Connect hero): Account (sign out / delete account — the App Store-required deletion path), Apple Health status, daily step goal with quick presets plus a Custom stepper for any in-bounds value, a privacy explainer + policy link, and About/version.
name: SettingsView

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, shown via the settings application scenario.

description: The optional welcome/sign-in screen: Buddy, a Sign in with Apple button, and an equal-weight 'Continue without an account'. Shown in production when undecided; previewable via the sign-in-welcome scenario.
name: SignInView

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, shown via the sign-in-welcome application scenario.

description: A single labeled metric tile with an icon, value, and caption.
name: StatTile

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: The three at-a-glance metric tiles: active minutes, distance, and time since moving.

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

name: StepRing

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Persists the two independent sync opt-ins (settings, and health off-by-default) plus the one-time health-consent acknowledgement; health sync cannot be enabled without consent.
name: SyncConsentStore

description: Pure last-write-wins reconciliation of a local value against an optional remote one, returning the winner plus whether to push local or adopt remote.
name: SyncMerge

description: The full Today surface composed from the header, Buddy summary, stats row, and the coach, latest-activity, and weekly-load cards. Exercised by the Today dashboard application scenarios.
name: TodayDashboard

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI composition view; this stack has no component-isolation harness, so it is demonstrated via the application scenarios on the simulator.

description: The dashboard's top header with the Today title, the day, and the RunBuddy wordmark.
name: TodayHeader

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Colored pill describing the week's training-load trend, with distinct colors for spiking, recovering, building, and steady.
name: TrendBadge

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: The app's text-role scale (largeTitle, title, body, caption, …) mapping each role to a SwiftUI text style with the brand rounded design and weights, so all text scales with Dynamic Type. Single source of truth replacing scattered fixed point sizes.
name: Typography

untestabilityReason.justification: A set of static Font constants (design tokens); no branching logic to test, exercised visually via scenarios.

description: Live URLSession-backed HTTP transport for the account/* sync endpoints; the network IO seam behind the injectable AccountSyncTransport protocol.
name: URLSessionAccountSyncTransport

untestabilityReason.justification: URLSession network boundary - the merge/gating logic it serves is unit-tested via the injectable transport seam in AccountSyncTests

description: Locally-persisted user preferences (no account): the daily step goal with a default, fixed preset options, and custom-goal bounds (minGoal/maxGoal/goalIncrement) plus clampGoal/isPreset helpers. Read by the production HealthKit path and edited in Settings (presets + Custom stepper).
name: UserPreferences

description: The week's training-load snapshot: mileage, run days, longest run, and rest days, with a trend badge.
name: WeeklyLoadCard

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

Mirrors CoachEngine; honors the conservative, never-shame-based, injury-aware coaching rules.
name: WeeklyReviewEngine

description: The recap's closing one-focus-area callout — a single prominent next-action on the brand/gold gradient.
name: WeeklyReviewFocusCallout

name: WeeklyReviewRiskSection

name: WeeklyReviewSection

description: The read-only Weekly Review screen: composes the header, hero, the four prose sections, the training-risk section, and the focus-area callout over a WeeklyReview value, branching between the activity recap and the empty first-week prompt.
name: WeeklyReviewView

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Summary of the most recent run, walk, or ride: distance and pace headline plus duration, date, and source.
name: WorkoutCard

untestabilityReason.justification: Native SwiftUI view; no component-isolation harness on this stack, so it is shown via the application scenarios.

description: Fixed-window in-memory rate-limit check: true when the key is under its limit for the current window. Best-effort, per-instance.
name: allow

description: Fetch a path from the live App Store Connect API with a bearer JWT (maintainer build-status script).
name: api

untestabilityReason.justification: calls the live App Store Connect REST API; standalone maintainer ops script with no offline harness, not part of the shipped app

description: Pure mapping from Apple's ASAuthorizationAppleIDProvider.CredentialState to the decoupled AppleCredentialState enum (authorized/revoked/notFound/unknown), with .transferred treated as inconclusive so the session is retained.
name: appleCredentialState

description: Base64url-encode a buffer for the App Store Connect ES256 JWT (maintainer build-status script).
name: b64url

untestabilityReason.justification: pure base64url string transform with no branching logic, inside a standalone maintainer ops script

description: Extract the raw bearer token from a request Authorization header, or null. Case-insensitive on the scheme.
name: bearerToken

description: Resolve the expected Apple bundle id (the identity-token audience) from env, defaulting to the app bundle.
name: bundleId

untestabilityReason.justification: reads an env var with a constant default; no branching logic

description: Clamps a custom daily step goal into the minGoal...maxGoal range and rounds it to the nearest goalIncrement, so any user-dialed value is always in-bounds and on a clean 500-step rail.
name: clampGoal

description: Derive a client IP from the x-forwarded-for header for rate-limit keying.
name: clientIp

description: Mint a session for a verified user: generate a 256-bit token, store its hash in Supabase, and return the raw token (shown to the client once).
name: createSession

description: Deletes the user's account_health row entirely - the opt-out and delete-my-health-data path; tolerates a 404.
name: deleteHealth

description: Revoke a session by token hash (sign-out / token rotation). Idempotent — a 404 is not an error.
name: deleteSession

description: Deletes a device's Strava token row from Supabase, tolerating a 404 and throwing on other errors.
name: deleteToken

description: Extract and validate the x-device-key request header, returning the trimmed key (empty string when absent/invalid).
name: deviceKeyFromHeader

description: Pure, case-insensitive mapping from a scenario-seeded rbContentSize string (e.g. xxxl, accessibility3) to a SwiftUI DynamicTypeSize; empty/unrecognized returns nil to honor the system size. Drives the app-wide Dynamic Type override for accessibility text-size scenarios.
name: dynamicTypeSize

description: Reads a required environment variable, throwing a typed missing_env error when it is unset.
name: env

description: Exchanges a Strava OAuth authorization code for tokens using the client secret, throwing on failure.
name: exchangeCode

description: Fetches recent Strava activities and maps them to the app's MappedWorkout shape, filtering out any that fail date validation.
name: fetchMappedActivities

description: Formats a whole number with locale thousands separators for readable step counts, e.g. 11240 becomes 11,240.
name: formatted

description: Returns a valid Strava access token for a device, refreshing against Strava and persisting the new token when the current one is near expiry.
name: freshAccessToken

description: Reads the signed-in user's account_health row from Supabase, or null when none exists.
name: getHealth

description: Reads the signed-in user's account_prefs row from Supabase, or null when none exists.
name: getPrefs

description: Reads a device's stored Strava token row from Supabase, returning null when none exists and throwing on a failed read.
name: getToken

description: Serverless endpoint for the optional health sync stream: GET reads the health row, PUT does a last-write-wins upsert, DELETE removes the row on opt-out.
name: handler

description: Vercel endpoint /api/account/session: POST verifies an Apple identity token and mints a bearer session; DELETE revokes the current session (idempotent sign-out).
name: handler

description: Serverless endpoint for the settings/preferences sync stream: GET reads the prefs row, PUT does a last-write-wins upsert and rejects any payload carrying health fields.
name: handler

description: Vercel serverless endpoint for the AI coach: validates the BYO Anthropic key and question, calls Claude with the injury-aware system prompt and structured output, and returns a CoachReply, degrading gracefully on refusal or malformed output and mapping 401/429 upstream errors.
name: handler

description: GET endpoint that reads a device's Strava token, refreshes it when expired, and returns recent activities mapped to the app's workout shape (not-connected with an empty list when no token).
name: handler

description: OAuth redirect endpoint that bounces the browser back into the otterpace:// app scheme with the code (or error) plus state so ASWebAuthenticationSession can capture it.
name: handler

description: POST endpoint that forgets a device's Strava tokens via a server-side Supabase delete.
name: handler

description: POST endpoint that exchanges a Strava OAuth code for tokens and stores them in Supabase, returning only a success flag and the athlete first name.
name: handler

description: SHA-256 hex of a session token — only this hash is ever persisted, never the raw token.
name: hashToken

description: Builds the Supabase PostgREST URL for the account_health table from SUPABASE_URL.
name: healthEndpoint

description: Last-write-wins decision shared by both sync streams: true when there is no stored row or the incoming updated_at is strictly newer than the stored one.
name: incomingWins

description: Reports whether a step goal equals one of the fixed quick-preset options, used by Settings to decide between highlighting a preset capsule and the Custom chip.
name: isPreset

description: True when a device-key string matches the allowed 16–128 char [A-Za-z0-9_-] pattern.
name: isValidDeviceKey

description: Mint a short-lived ES256 App Store Connect API JWT from the local AuthKey (maintainer build-status script).
name: jwt

untestabilityReason.justification: signs a JWT with a local App Store Connect private key file for the live ASC API; standalone maintainer ops script, not part of the shipped app

description: Maps a single Strava activity to a MappedWorkout, returning null when the date is missing or malformed; computes miles and pace.
name: mapActivity

description: Renders minutes-since-last-movement as a compact label: now at or below zero, bare minutes under an hour, and hours-plus-minutes above, dropping the minutes part when it is zero.
name: movementLabel

description: Formats a speed in meters per second as a mm:ss/mi pace string with zero-padded seconds.
name: pacePerMile

description: Defense-in-depth guard: true when a settings/preferences payload carries any health field, so the prefs endpoint can reject it and never leak health data into the wrong row.
name: prefsContainHealthFields

description: Builds the Supabase PostgREST URL for the account_prefs table from SUPABASE_URL.
name: prefsEndpoint

description: Converts an ISO yyyy-MM-dd date into a short weekday-and-day label such as Mon, Jun 22, returning the input unchanged when it is not a valid ISO date.
name: prettyDate

description: Authenticate a request from its bearer session token, returning the verified user id or null (handlers map null to 401). User id derives only from the token, never the request body.
name: requireUser

description: Rounds a number to one decimal place.
name: round1

description: Recursively walk a prefs payload (bounded depth) detecting any health-related key, backing prefsContainHealthFields so the prefs endpoint never stores health data.
name: scanForHealthKey

description: Supabase REST URL for the account_sessions table, derived from SUPABASE_URL.
name: sessionsEndpoint

description: Builds the VoiceOver spoken summary for the step-goal ring, mirroring the three caption states with whole-number step, goal, and remaining counts; never shame-based.
name: stepGoalAccessibilityValue

description: Builds the caption shown under the step-goal ring count: a celebratory crushed-goal line once steps pass the goal, a goal-hit line at exactly the goal, and otherwise the of-goal target framing.
name: stepGoalCaption

description: Clamps a goal-progress fraction to the drawable step-ring arc range; floors near zero so the rounded cap shows and caps a met or crushed goal at a full turn. Drives both the trim length and the gradient span.
name: stepRingFill

description: Builds the apikey + bearer Authorization headers for Supabase PostgREST from the service-role key.
name: supabaseHeaders

description: Builds the Supabase PostgREST URL for the strava_tokens table from SUPABASE_URL.
name: tokensEndpoint

description: Upserts the user's health/activity snapshot row into account_health via merge-duplicates.
name: upsertHealth

description: Upserts the user's settings/preferences row into account_prefs via merge-duplicates.
name: upsertPrefs

description: Upserts a device's Strava token row into Supabase using merge-duplicates, throwing on a non-OK response.
name: upsertToken

description: Resolve the user id for a bearer token by its stored hash, or null when it is not a live session.
name: userIdForToken

description: Verify a Sign in with Apple identity token (issuer, audience, signature) against Apple live JWKS and return the stable user sub.
name: verifyAppleIdentityToken

untestabilityReason.justification: verifies tokens against Apple live JWKS endpoint (appleid.apple.com) with no deterministic offline path. The handler that consumes it is covered in test/api/session.test.ts with the verifier mocked.
